MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Quinn for Irene Bennarucci (Petitioner).

The Court raised the issue with the lack of a proof of service or waiver of notice. Mr. Quinn stated that the family will sign the waiver of notice and that he can file them quickly. The Petition Declaring Interest, etc. was continued to October 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)
